scene_prd_competitor.name: 竞品与价格分析
scene_prd_competitor.description: 围绕品牌、品类、价格带、来源站点、材质、功能、图案和肌理做竞品对比；当前数据不具备真实平台价差和同款识别能力。
sample_goals: 最近30天各二级类目下各品牌的价格带分布如何
按二级类目分组，各品牌的价格定位差异是什么，返回SKU数、均价、价格跨度
各来源站点域名下品牌SKU覆盖和平均价格差异是什么，注意这不是平台价差
各二级类目中品牌SKU覆盖和平均价差异是多少，识别可对比的品牌品类组合
各品牌在材质维度上的SKU覆盖和平均价格有什么差异
各品牌功能标签覆盖数、SKU数和平均价格有什么差异
按二级类目分组，各品牌图案和肌理结构差异是什么
各品牌在织造方式和工艺类型上的覆盖差异是什么

scene_prd_price.name: 商品价格分析
scene_prd_price.description: 围绕品牌、品类、来源站点和场景标签的价格结构、价格带和价差分析。

价格带分桶基于Price数值；若Price存在币种未归一或异常值，分布可能偏差。

sess_c607d96a15.intent: 最近30天各品牌指定二级类目的价格带分布如何
risk_notes: 输入未提供具体二级类目取值，SQL使用参数:subcategory。
价格带区间为默认分桶规则，若业务已有固定分层口径需替换。

sess_139d350379.intent: 最近30天各品牌指定二级类目的价格带分布如何
risk_notes: 输入未提供具体二级类目取值，因此SQL按所有非空二级类目分组；如需单一指定类目，应补充二级类目过滤值。

query_55dc91af05.sql: SELECT ci.BrandName AS `品牌`, csi.Scene AS `场景标签`, AVG(ci.Price) AS `平均价格` FROM clothing_info ci INNER JOIN clothing_scene_info csi ON ci.Id = csi.ClothingId GROUP BY ci.BrandName, csi.Scene ORDER BY ci.BrandName, csi.Scene
query_55dc91af05.sql_explanation: 根据意图分析各品牌在不同平台（场景）的销售价差异，选择品牌、场景标签作为分组维度，计算每个品牌在每个平台的平均价格。
insight_summary: 本轮结果来自 SQL Agent 直连 MySQL：dataservice_test_local

query_bc0a573f90.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ci.BrandName AS "品牌",
    csi.Scene AS "场景标签",
    ci.Price AS price
  FROM clothing_info ci
  INNER JOIN clothing_scene_info csi
    ON ci.Id = csi.ClothingId
  WHERE ci.Price IS NOT NULL
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    "品牌",
    "场景标签",
    AVG(price) AS avg_price,
    MIN(price) AS min_price,
    MAX(price) AS max_price,
    COUNT(*) AS sku_cnt
  FROM base
  GROUP BY "品牌", "场景标签"
), brand_gap AS (
  SELECT
    "品牌",
    MAX(avg_price) - MIN(avg_price) AS avg_price_gap,
    MAX(max_price) - MIN(min_price) AS extreme_price_gap,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "场景标签") AS platform_cnt,
    SUM(sku_cnt) AS total_sku_cnt
  FROM agg
  GROUP BY "品牌"
)
SELECT
  a."品牌",
  a."场景标签",
  a.avg_price AS "平均价格",
  a.min_price,
  a.max_price,
  a.sku_cnt,
  bg.platform_cnt,
  bg.total_sku_cnt,
  bg.avg_price_gap,
  bg.extreme_price_gap
FROM agg a
JOIN brand_gap bg
  ON a."品牌" = bg."品牌"
ORDER BY bg.avg_price_gap DESC, a."品牌", a."场景标签";
insight_summary:
MySQL 执行失败: (1064, 'You have an error in your SQL syntax; check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL server version for the right syntax to use near '"品牌",
  a."场景标签",
  a.avg_price AS "平均价格",
  a.min_price,
  ' at line 31')

query_1cc9962234.sql: SELECT ci.BrandName AS "品牌", COUNT(DISTINCT ci.Id) AS "SKU数", AVG(ci.Price) AS "平均价", MIN(ci.Price) AS "最低价", MAX(ci.Price) AS "最高价", (MAX(ci.Price) - MIN(ci.Price)) AS "价格跨度" FROM clothing_info ci WHERE ci.BrandName IS NOT NULL AND ci.Price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ci.BrandName ORDER BY "价格跨度" DESC LIMIT 20;
query_1cc9962234.sql_explanation: 按品牌（BrandName）分组，统计SKU数（去重Id）、平均/最低/最高价格（Price），并计算价格跨度=最高价-最低价，按跨度降序取前20。
insight_summary: 本轮结果来自 SQL Agent 直连 MySQL：dataservice_test_local

query_123d213d9c.sql:
SELECT
  ci.BrandName AS `品牌`,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ci.Id) AS `SKU数`,
  AVG(ci.Price) AS `平均价`,
  MIN(ci.Price) AS `最低价`,
  MAX(ci.Price) AS `最高价`,
  (MAX(ci.Price) - MIN(ci.Price)) AS `价格跨度`
FROM clothing_info ci
WHERE ci.BrandName IS NOT NULL
  AND ci.Price IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ci.BrandName
ORDER BY `价格跨度` DESC
LIMIT 20;
query_123d213d9c.sql_explanation: 按品牌聚合统计SKU数、均价、最低价、最高价，并计算价格跨度=最高价-最低价，按跨度降序取前20。
insight_summary: 本轮结果来自 SQL Agent 直连 MySQL：dataservice_test_local

query_63e790b5e8.sql:
WITH anchor AS (
  SELECT MAX(DATE(clothing_info.ReceiveTime)) AS anchor_date
  FROM clothing_info
), base AS (
  SELECT
    clothing_info.Id AS product_id,
    clothing_info.BrandName AS brand,
    clothing_info.SubCategory AS subcategory,
    clothing_info.Price AS price
  FROM clothing_info
  JOIN anchor
  WHERE clothing_info.ReceiveTime >= DATE_SUB(anchor.anchor_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND clothing_info.ReceiveTime < DATE_ADD(anchor.anchor_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    AND clothing_info.Price IS NOT NULL
), banded AS (
  SELECT
    base.brand,
    base.subcategory,
    CASE
      WHEN base.price BETWEEN 0 AND 99 THEN '0-99'
      WHEN base.price BETWEEN 100 AND 199 THEN '100-199'
      WHEN base.price BETWEEN 200 AND 399 THEN '200-399'
      WHEN base.price BETWEEN 400 AND 799 THEN '400-799'
      WHEN base.price >= 800 THEN '800+'
      ELSE '其他'
    END AS price_band,
    base.product_id
  FROM base
)
SELECT
  banded.brand AS `品牌`,
  banded.subcategory AS `二级类目`,
  banded.price_band AS `价格带`,
  COUNT(DISTINCT banded.product_id) AS `价格带SKU数`,
  COUNT(DISTINCT banded.product_id) / NULLIF(
    SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT banded.product_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY banded.brand, banded.subcategory),
    0
  ) AS `品牌内价格带占比`
FROM banded
GROUP BY
  banded.brand,
  banded.subcategory,
  banded.price_band
ORDER BY
  `二级类目` ASC,
  `品牌` ASC,
  `价格带` ASC;
query_63e790b5e8.sql_explanation: 以clothing_info中最大抓取日期(ReceiveTime)为anchor_date，取最近30天窗口内数据；按品牌、二级类目与固定价格带分桶统计去重SKU数，并计算同一品牌+二级类目内各价格带SKU占比。
insight_summary: 本轮结果来自 SQL Agent 直连 MySQL：dataservice_test_local

query_f3959794ec.sql: WITH base AS (SELECT ci.SubCategory, ci.BrandName, cpi.pattern, cti.PatternDefinition, cti.PatternLayout, cti.PatternComposition, cti.PatternStyle, cti.PatternTechnique, cti.FabricType, cti.Texture, ci.Id, ci.Price FROM clothing_info ci LEFT JOIN clothing_pattern_info cpi ON ci.Id = cpi.ClothingId LEFT JOIN clothing_texture_info cti ON ci.Id = cti.ClothingId WHERE ci.SubCategory IS NOT NULL AND ci.BrandName IS NOT NULL) SELECT SubCategory AS `二级类目`, BrandName AS `品牌`, COALESCE(pattern, '未知') AS `图案`, COALESCE(PatternDefinition, '未知') AS `图案定义`, COALESCE(PatternLayout, '未知') AS `图案布局`, COALESCE(PatternComposition, '未知') AS `图案构成`, COALESCE(PatternStyle, '未知') AS `图案风格`, COALESCE(PatternTechnique, '未知') AS `工艺类型`, COALESCE(FabricType, '未知') AS `织造方式`, COALESCE(Texture, '未知') AS `肌理`, COUNT(DISTINCT Id) AS `商品数`, AVG(Price) AS `平均价格` FROM base GROUP BY SubCategory, BrandName, COALESCE(pattern, '未知'), COALESCE(PatternDefinition, '未知'), COALESCE(PatternLayout, '未知'), COALESCE(PatternComposition, '未知'), COALESCE(PatternStyle, '未知'), COALESCE(PatternTechnique, '未知'), COALESCE(FabricType, '未知'), COALESCE(Texture, '未知') ORDER BY SubCategory, `商品数` DESC, BrandName
query_f3959794ec.sql_explanation: 按二级类目、品牌、图案与肌理结构字段聚合，统计不同品牌在同一二级类目下的图案、布局、构成、风格、工艺、织造方式和肌理分布，并使用COUNT DISTINCT商品ID避免一对多关系导致重复计数。

query_2872004216.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ci.`BrandName` AS brand,
    ci.`SubCategory` AS sub_category,
    ci.`Id` AS product_id,
    ci.`Price` AS price
  FROM clothing_info ci
  WHERE ci.`ReceiveTime` >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day'
    AND ci.`SubCategory` = :subcategory
    AND ci.`Price` IS NOT NULL
), bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    brand,
    sub_category,
    product_id,
    CASE
      WHEN price < 100 THEN '0-99'
      WHEN price < 200 THEN '100-199'
      WHEN price < 300 THEN '200-299'
      WHEN price < 500 THEN '300-499'
      WHEN price < 1000 THEN '500-999'
      ELSE '1000+'
    END AS price_band
  FROM base
)
SELECT
  brand,
  sub_category,
  price_band,
  COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS product_count
FROM bucketed
GROUP BY brand, sub_category, price_band
ORDER BY brand, sub_category,
  CASE price_band
    WHEN '0-99' THEN 1
    WHEN '100-199' THEN 2
    WHEN '200-299' THEN 3
    WHEN '300-499' THEN 4
    WHEN '500-999' THEN 5
    ELSE 6
  END;
insight_summary:
MySQL 执行失败: (1064, "You have an error in your SQL syntax; check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL server version for the right syntax to use near ':subcategory
    AND ci.`Price` IS NOT NULL
), bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    brand,' at line 9")

query_a40c5c7dbf.sql: WITH base AS (SELECT Id, BrandName, SubCategory, Price FROM clothing_info WHERE ReceiveTime >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 day' AND SubCategory IS NOT NULL AND Price IS NOT NULL) SELECT BrandName AS brand, SubCategory AS sub_category, CASE WHEN Price < 100 THEN '0-99' WHEN Price >= 100 AND Price < 300 THEN '100-299' WHEN Price >= 300 AND Price < 500 THEN '300-499' WHEN Price >= 500 AND Price < 1000 THEN '500-999' WHEN Price >= 1000 AND Price < 2000 THEN '1000-1999' ELSE '2000+' END AS price_band, COUNT(DISTINCT Id) AS product_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Id) * 1.0 / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT Id)) OVER (PARTITION BY BrandName, SubCategory), 4) AS band_ratio FROM base GROUP BY BrandName, SubCategory, CASE WHEN Price < 100 THEN '0-99' WHEN Price >= 100 AND Price < 300 THEN '100-299' WHEN Price >= 300 AND Price < 500 THEN '300-499' WHEN Price >= 500 AND Price < 1000 THEN '500-999' WHEN Price >= 1000 AND Price < 2000 THEN '1000-1999' ELSE '2000+' END ORDER BY BrandName, SubCategory, price_band
insight_summary: MySQL 执行失败: (1064, "You have an error in your SQL syntax; check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL server version for the right syntax to use near ') SELECT BrandName AS brand, SubCategory AS sub_category, CASE WHEN Price < 100 ' at line 1")
